title: CAMCAN 2015 Conference receives regulators & operators supports
description: The annual conference of Capital Market Correspondents Association of Nigeria (CAMCAN) received a boost as the apex regulator in the capital market, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Self-
html:
The annual conference of Capital Market Correspondents Association of Nigeria (CAMCAN) received a boost as the apex regulator in the capital market, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Self-Regulatory Organizations (SRO) and some quoted companies in the market has made commitment towards the 2015 conference.

The annual workshop serves as an avenue for journalist covering the nation capital market to sharpen their professional skills on key issues in the market and its effects on the whole economy.

This year theme is Effective Reporting of Changes in the Nigerian Capital Market According to the planning committee of CAMCAN, the 2015 National Workshop is slated to hold on Saturday November 28 and Sunday November 29 in Lagos, the Managing Director of Financial Market Dealer Quotation (FMDQ) OTC, Mr. Bola Onadele. Koko and Managing Director of National Association of Securities Dealers (NASD) Plc, Mr. Bola Ajomale would be the guest speakers.

The two OTC executives will use the opportunity to talk about their respective market, opportunities and challenges so far. Other expected stakeholders and operators includes, Chairman, Association of Issuing Houses of Nigeria (AIHN), Mr. Victor Ogiemwonyi, Chief Executive, Stanbic IBTC Nominees, Mr. Akeem Oyewale, and Managing Director of Proshare Nigeria, Mr. Femi Awoyemi.

Some of the institutions that are partnering with CAMCAN are, FMDQ OTC, Access Bank Plc, Oando Plc, SEC, NSE, United Bank for Africa Plc, Forte Oil Plc, Sterling Bank Plc, Skye Bank Plc, Guaranty Trust Bank Plc, United Capital Plc.
